description: A two-column promotional block featuring an image on the left and content (eyebrow, title, description, CTA) on the right. Used to promote podcasts, series, or other media content.

FR-01.title: Promo Image
FR-01.description: The block MUST display a promotional image on the left side.
acceptance: Image occupies approximately 40% of block width
Object-fit: cover or contain depending on asset

FR-02.title: Eyebrow Label
FR-02.description: The block MUST display an H2 eyebrow label identifying the content type.

FR-03.title: Content Title
FR-03.description: The block MUST display an H5 title for the promoted content.
acceptance: H5 heading, F37 Lineca Medium, 28px, weight 800

FR-04.title: Description Paragraph
FR-04.description: The block MUST display a description paragraph.

FR-05.title: CTA Link
FR-05.description: The block MUST include a 'Learn more' CTA link.

FR-06.title: Responsive Behavior
FR-06.description: The block MUST stack vertically on mobile.
acceptance: Desktop: Side-by-side layout (image left, content right)
Tablet/Mobile: Image stacked on top, content below

accessibility.AC-01: Image MUST have meaningful alt text
accessibility.AC-02: CTA link MUST clearly indicate destination
